channel.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Oct 3rd - Oct 9th, 2022
item.description:
Schema

Diagrams

  • Azimuttstars344 - An Entity Relationship diagram (ERD) visualization tool, with various filters and inputs to help understand your database schema.

    • SQL

    Analyzers

  • SQLLineagestars425 - SQL Lineage Analysis Tool powered by Python.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Aug 22nd - Aug 28th, 2022
item.description:
Schema

Design

  • Moon Modeler - Data modeling tool for both noSQL and relational databases. Available for Windows, Linux and macOS.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2022
item.description:
SQL

Learning

  • Advanced SQL Puzzlesstars93 - Difficult set-based SQL puzzles.
  • Hackerrank - Practice coding, prepare for interviews, and get hired.
  • LeetCode - Enhance your skills, expand your knowledge and prepare for technical interviews.
  • Select Star SQL - Free interactive book which aims to be the best place on the internet for learning SQL.
  • StrataScratch - Data science educational resources.
  • SQL Murder Mysterystars1.2k - Self-directed lesson to learn SQL concepts and commands and a fun game for experienced SQL users to solve an intriguing crime.

    • SQL

    Scripts

  • DBA MultiToolstars69 - T-SQL scripts for the long haul: optimizing storage, on-the-fly documentation, and general administrative needs for SQL Server.
  • pgx_scriptsstars1.1k - A collection of useful little scripts for database analysis and administration, created by our team at PostgreSQL Experts.
  • pgsql-bloat-estimationstars391 - Queries to mesure statistical bloat in indexes and tables for PostgreSQL.
  • pgWikiDont - SQL test that checks if your database follows rules from https://wiki.postgresql.org/wiki/Don't_Do_This.
  • pg-utilsstars662 - Useful PostgreSQL utilities.
  • Postgres cheat sheet - Useful SQL-scripts and commands by <timescale.com>.
  • postgres_dbastars697 - The missing set of useful tools for Postgres DBAs and all engineers.
  • postgres_queries_and_commands.sql - Useful PostgreSQL Queries and Commands.
  • TPTstars535 - These sqlplus scripts are for Oracle Database performance optimization & troubleshooting.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jul 4th - Jul 10th, 2022
item.description:
Application platforms

  • Nhoststars4.5k - The Open Source Firebase Alternative with GraphQL.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Data

Compare

  • data-diffstars1.7k - Command-line tool and Python library to efficiently diff rows across two different databases.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2022
item.description:
IDE

  • DBHawk - Datasparc offers database security, database management, database governance and data analytics - all in one solution.

    • API

  • Remultstars1.1k - End-to-end type-safe CRUD via REST API for your database, with fine-grained access control.

    • Schema

    Design

  • DbSchema - Universal database designer for out-of-the-box schema management, schema documentation, design in a team, and deployment on multiple databases. DbSchema features tools for writing and executing queries, exploring the data, generating data, and building reports.

    • GUI

  • DB Lensstars212 - Open Source Postgres GUI - Automatic ER diagrams, Internal DB Insights, Disk Utilisation, Performance Metrics, Index Usage, Sequential scan counts and more.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 6th - Jun 12th, 2022
item.description:
IDE

  • Sql Server Management Studio - SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS) is an integrated environment for managing any SQL infrastructure, for SQL Server and Azure SQL Databases.

    • Application platforms

  • Tooljetstars14k - Open-source low-code platform to build internal tools.

    • GUI

  • Arctype - The SQL client and database management tool that's fun to use.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 30th - Jun 5th, 2022
item.description:
GUI

  • Azure Data Studiostars6.9k - A data management tool that enables working with SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Azure SQL DB and SQL DW from Windows, macOS and Linux.
  • Sequel Acestars5k - MySQL/MariaDB database management for macOS.
  • Query.me - Collaborative SQL editor in Notebook format. Let's you reference query results using JINJA, visualize data, and schedule runs and exports.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

    Prometheus

  • pg_exporterstars116 - Fully customizable Prometheus exporter for PostgreSQL & Pgbouncer with fine-grained execution control.

    • Distributions

  • Pigstystars714 - Battery-Included Open-Source Distribution for PostgreSQL with ultimate observability & Database-as-Code toolbox for developers.

    • Machine Learning

  • SQLFlowstars4.6k - Brings SQL and AI together.
  • MindsDBstars10.7k - In-database Machine Learning.

    • CLI

  • sqlite-utilsstars999 - CLI tools for manipulating SQLite database files - inserting data, running queries, creating indexes, configuring full-text search and more.

    • API

  • PostGraphilestars11.6k - Instantly spin-up a GraphQL API server by pointing PostGraphile at your existing PostgreSQL database.

    • Application platforms

  • Appsmithstars21.6k - Powerful open source low code framework to build internal applications really quickly.

    • SQL

    Über SQL

  • Trinostars6.3k - Trino is a distributed SQL query engine designed to query large data sets distributed over one or more heterogeneous data sources.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 23rd - May 29th, 2022
item.description:
GUI

  • Malewiczstars40 - Yet Another WEB client for DB schema exploring and performance analysis, but originally created specifically for hacking and extending.

    • Data

  • QuickTable - Empowers everyone to access, clean, analyze, transform, and model data with no code.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 2nd - May 8th, 2022
item.description:
Schema

Changes

  • Skeemastars1.1k - Declarative pure-SQL schema management system for MySQL and MariaDB, with support for sharding and external online schema change tools.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Apr 25th - May 1st, 2022
item.description:
Schema

Design

  • WWW SQL Designerstars2.6k - Online SQL diagramming tool.

    • SQL

    Parsers

  • SQLGlotstars1.5k - Pure Python SQL parser, transpiler, and builder.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Apr 4th - Apr 10th, 2022
item.description:
Data

Catalog

  • Amundsenstars3.6k - Metadata driven application for improving the productivity of data analysts, data scientists and engineers when interacting with data.
  • DataHubstars6.4k - The Metadata Platform for the Modern Data Stack.
  • Marquezstars1.2k - Collect, aggregate, and visualize a data ecosystem's metadata.

    • Schema

    Changes

  • pg-oscstars286 - Easy CLI tool for making zero downtime schema changes and backfills in PostgreSQL.

    • SQL

    Parsers

  • libpg_querystars744 - C library for accessing the PostgreSQL parser outside of the server environment.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • PostgreSQL Metricsstars564 - Service to extract and provide metrics on your PostgreSQL database.
  • postgres-checkup - New-generation diagnostics tool that allows users to do a deep analysis of the health of Postgres databases.
  • pgMonitorstars368 - All-in-one tool to easily create an environment to visualize the health and performance of your PostgreSQL cluster.

    • Schema

    Design

  • Database Designstars294 - Useful tips for designing robust database schema.

    • SQL

    Plan

  • pev2stars1.6k - A VueJS component to show a graphical vizualization of a PostgreSQL execution plan.
  • pg_flamestars1.5k - A flamegraph generator for Postgres EXPLAIN ANALYZE output.

    • SQL

    Über SQL

  • osquerystars19.4k - SQL powered operating system instrumentation, monitoring, and analytics.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Mar 28th - Apr 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • Promscalestars1.2k - The open-source observability backend for metrics and traces powered by SQL.
  • pgbadgerstars23 - A fast PostgreSQL Log Analyzer.

    • Data

    Generators

  • Fakerstars7.7k - Generate massive amounts of fake data in the browser and Node.js.
  • Beneratorstars73 - Generate, obfuscate (anonymize / pseudonymize) and migrate data for development, testing and training purposes.
  • dbForge Data Generator for MySQL - Powerful GUI tool for creating massive volumes of realistic test data.
  • dbForge Data Generator for Oracle - Small but mighty GUI tool for populating Oracle schemas with tons of realistic test data.
  • dbForge Data Generator for SQL Server - Powerful GUI tool for a fast generation of meaningful test data for databases.
  • Noisiastars671 - Harmful workload generator for PostgreSQL.
  • SB Data Generator - Simple and powerful tool to generate and populate selected tables or entire databases with realistic test data for your applications. Generate test data for: Oracle, MS SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Firebird, SQLite, Azure SQL Database, Amazon Redshift and Amazon RDS.

    • HA/Failover/Sharding

  • pgslicestars824 - Postgres partitioning as easy as pie.

    • Schema

    Changes

  • Atlasstars2k - Inspect and Apply changes to your database schema.
  • Reshapestars1.4k - An easy-to-use, zero-downtime schema migration tool for Postgres.
  • sqldefstars1.3k - Idempotent schema management for MySQL, PostgreSQL, and more.

    • Schema

    Documentations

  • dbdocs - Create web-based database documentation using DSL code.
  • DBMLstars1.5k - Database Markup Language, designed to define and document database structures.
  • SchemaCrawlerstars1.3k - A free database schema discovery and comprehension tool.
  • Schema Spystars2.3k - Generating your database to HTML documentation, including Entity Relationship diagrams.
  • tblsstars1.5k - CI-Friendly tool for document a database, written in Go.

    • Schema

    Design

  • DBDiagram - A free, simple tool to draw ER diagrams by just writing code.
  • ERBuilder Data Modeler - Easy-to-use database modeling software for high-quality data models. It's a complete data modeling solution for data modelers and data architects.
  • Navicat Data Modeler - A powerful and cost-effective database design tool which helps you build high-quality conceptual, logical and physical data models.
  • Oracle SQL Developer Data Modeler - Oracle SQL Developer Data Modeler is a free graphical tool that enhances productivity and simplifies data modeling tasks.
  • pgmodelerstars2.5k - Data modeling tool designed for PostgreSQL.

    • Testing

  • SQLancerstars1k - Automatically test DBMS in order to find logic bugs in their implementation.

    • Schema

    Diagrams

  • ERAlchemystars966 - Entity Relation Diagrams generation tool.

    • Schema

    Samples

  • Oracle Database Sample Schemasstars536 - Oracle Database Sample Schemas.

    • Data

  • dbtstars5.9k - Transform your data by simply writing select statements, while dbt handles turning these statements into tables and views in a data warehouse.

    • Data

    Replication

  • dtlestars483 - Distributed Data Transfer Service for MySQL.
  • Litestreamstars7.5k - Streaming replication for SQLite.
  • pgsyncstars2.5k - Sync Postgres data between databases.
  • pg_chameleonstars320 - MySQL to PostgreSQL replica system written in Python 3. The system use the library mysql-replication to pull the row images from MySQL which are stored into PostgreSQL as JSONB.
  • PGDeltaStreamstars233 - A Golang webserver to stream Postgres changes atleast-once over websockets, using Postgres logical decoding feature.
  • repmgrstars1.3k - The Most Popular Replication Manager for PostgreSQL.

    • SQL

    Über SQL

  • Resmo - Audit and evaluate resources using SQL.
  • Steampipestars3.7k - Use SQL to instantly query your cloud services (AWS, Azure, GCP and more).
  • CloudQuerystars2.5k - Extracts, transforms, and loads your cloud assets into normalized PostgreSQL tables.
  • csvqstars1.1k - SQL-like query language for CSV.
  • dsqstars2.8k - Commandline tool for running SQL queries against JSON, CSV, Excel, Parquet, and more.
  • OctoSQLstars4.1k - Query tool that allows you to join, analyse and transform data from multiple databases and file formats using SQL.
  • TextQLstars8.9k - Execute SQL against structured text like CSV or TSV.
  • trdsqlstars1.3k - CLI tool that can execute SQL queries on CSV, LTSV, JSON and TBLN.

    • Application platforms

  • Budibasestars15.4k - Low-code platform for creating internal apps in minutes.
  • Saltcornstars934 - Open source no-code builder for web datatabase applications. Server and drag-and-drop UI builder, data stored in PostgreSQL or SQLite.

    • Cloning

  • clone_schemastars101 - Postgres clone schema utility without need of going outside of database.
  • Database Lab Engine - Instant thin cloning for Postgres to scale the development process.
  • Spawn - Cloud service for creating instant database copies for development and CI. No more local db installs, instant recovery to arbitrary save points, isolated copies for each feature branch or test. Instant provisioning regardless of database size.

    • Backup

  • pgcopydbstars579 - Copy a Postgres database to a target Postgres server (pg_dump | pg_restore on steroids).

    • API

  • Datasettestars6.5k - A tool for exploring and publishing data.

    • Papers

  • The "Database as Code" Manifestostars32 - Treat your database as Code.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Feb 14th - Feb 20th, 2022
item.description:
Security

  • Inspektorstars254 - Access control layer for databases. Inspektor leverages open policy agent to make policy decisions.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Feb 7th - Feb 13th, 2022
item.description:
SQL

Analyzers

  • TSQLLintstars170 - A tool for describing, identifying, and reporting the presence of anti-patterns in TSQL scripts.
  • SQLCheckstars2.2k - Automatically detects common SQL anti-patterns.
  • SQLFluffstars5.1k - Dialect-flexible and configurable SQL linter.

    • SQL

    Formatters

  • Poor SQL - Instant free and open-source T-SQL formatting.
  • CodeBuffstars399 - Language-agnostic pretty-printing through machine learning.
  • pgFormatterstars1.4k - A PostgreSQL SQL syntax beautifier.
  • SQL Formatterstars1.3k - JavaScript library for pretty-printing SQL queries.

    • CLI

  • usqlstars7.6k - A universal command-line interface for PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle Database, SQLite3, Microsoft SQL Server, and many other databases including NoSQL and non-relational databases!

    • SQL

    Extensions

  • PartiQL - SQL-compatible access to relational, semi-structured, and nested data.

    • SQL

    Frameworks

  • Apache Calcite - Dynamic data management framework with advanced SQL features.
  • ZetaSQLstars1.9k - Analyzer Framework for SQL.

    • SQL

    Parsers

  • General SQL Parser - Parsing, formatting, modification and analysis for SQL.
  • jOOQstars5.1k - Parses SQL, translates it to other dialects, and allows for expression tree transformations.
  • JSqlParserstars4k - Parses an SQL statement and translate it into a hierarchy of Java classes.
  • More SQL Parsing!stars169 - Parse SQL into JSON.
  • sqlparsestars3k - Non-validating SQL parser for Python.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jan 31st - Feb 6th, 2022
item.description:
IDE

  • Slashbase - The open-source collaborative IDE for your databases. Connect to your database, browse data, run a bunch of SQL commands or share SQL queries with your team, right from your browser.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jan 10th - Jan 16th, 2022
item.description:
GUI

  • ocelotguistars53 - For MySQL, MariaDB, and Tarantool. Developed for Linux but can run on Windows.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jan 3rd - Jan 9th, 2022
item.description:
Backup

  • BaRManstars1.4k - Backup and Recovery Manager for PostgreSQL.
  • pgbackreststars1.4k - Reliable PostgreSQL Backup & Restore.

    • CLI

  • SQLLinestars532 - Command-line shell for issuing SQL to relational databases via JDBC.

    • SQL

    Language Server Protocol

  • SQLLanguageServerstars371 - SQL Language Server.
  • sqlsstars660 - SQL Language Server written in Go.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Dec 6th - Dec 12th, 2021
item.description:
IDE

  • DataStationstars2.5k - Easily query, script, and visualize data from every database, file, and API.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Nov 8th - Nov 14th, 2021
item.description:
GUI

  • DbGatestars1.9k - Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Sep 6th - Sep 12th, 2021
item.description:
GUI

  • MissionKontrol - Modern drag & drop admin panel/client with full user permissions for non-technical users.
  • sqlite-tuistars1.2k - A TUI for viewing sqlite databases, written in Go.

    • Reporting

  • Chartbrew - Create live dashboards, charts, and client reports from multiple databases and services.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Aug 23rd - Aug 29th, 2021
item.description:
Schema

Changes

  • Bytebasestars4k - Web-based, zero-config, dependency-free database schema change and version control tool for teams.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jul 12th - Jul 18th, 2021
item.description:
GUI

  • Jailerstars1.4k - Database Subsetting and Relational Data Browsing Tool/Client.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
GUI

  • Beekeeper Studiostars11.7k - Open Source SQL Editor and Database Manager with a privacy commitment in their mission statement.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

Prometheus

  • pgSCVstars140 - Metrics exporter for PostgreSQL and Postgres-related services.
  • postgres_exporterstars1.8k - Prometheus exporter for PostgreSQL server metrics.

    • Security

  • Databunkerstars1k - Special GDPR compliant secure vault for customer records built on top of regular DB.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Schema

Changes

  • Prisma Migratestars773 - Declarative database schema migration tool that uses a declarative data modeling syntax to describe your database schema.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 25th - May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Schema

Changes

  • yuniqlstars323 - Yet another schema versioning and migration tool just made with native .NET Core 3.0+ and hopefully better.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Mar 16th - Mar 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Distributions

  • dbatoolsstars2k - PowerShell module that you may think of like a command-line SQL Server Management Studio.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
GUI

  • SQLToolsstars1k - Database management for VSCode.

    • CLI

  • iredisstars2.2k - A Cli for Redis with AutoCompletion and Syntax Highlighting.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
IDE

  • Toad Edge - Simplified database development tool for MySQL and Postgres.
  • PL/SQL Developer - IDE that is specifically targeted at the development of stored program units for Oracle Databases.

    • GUI

  • SQLite Expert - Graphical interface supports all SQLite features.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jan 27th - Feb 2nd, 2020
item.description:
API

  • sandman2stars1.9k - Automatically generate a RESTful API service for your legacy database.

    • Configuration Tuning

  • MySQLTuner-perlstars7.8k - Script written in Perl that allows you to review a MySQL installation quickly and make adjustments to increase performance and stability.
  • postgresqltuner.plstars2.3k - Simple script to analyse your PostgreSQL database configuration, and give tuning advice.

    • Schema

    Changes

  • Sqitchstars2.5k - Sensible database-native change management for framework-free development and dependable deployment.
  • SchemaHerostars674 - A Kubernetes operator for declarative database schema management (gitops for database schemas).

    • Security

  • Acrastars1.1k - Database security suite. Database proxy with field-level encryption, search through encrypted data, SQL injections prevention, intrusion detection, honeypots. Supports client-side and proxy-side ("transparent") encryption. SQL, NoSQL.

    • Distributions

  • DBdeployerstars614 - Tool that deploys MySQL database servers easily.
  • Postgres.appstars6.4k - Full-featured PostgreSQL installation packaged as a standard Mac app.
  • BigSQL - A developer-friendly distribution of Postgres.
  • Elephant Shedstars182 - Web-based PostgreSQL management front-end that bundles several utilities and applications for use with PostgreSQL.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • mssql-monitoringstars80 - Monitor your SQL Server on Linux performance using collectd, InfluxDB and Grafana.
  • ASH Viewerstars120 - Provides a graphical view of active session history data within the Oracle and PostgreSQL DB.

    • HA/Failover/Sharding

  • postgresql_clusterstars616 - PostgreSQL High-Availability Cluster (based on "Patroni" and "DCS(etcd)"). Automating deployment with Ansible.

    • Testing

  • RegreSQLstars242 - Regression Testing your SQL queries.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Configuration Tuning

  • PGConfigurator - Free online tool to generate an optimized postgresql.conf.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Dec 30th - Jan 5th, 2019
item.description:
Schema

Code generation

  • scheme2ddlstars72 - Command line util for export Oracle schema to set of ddl init scripts with ability to filter undesirable information, separate DDL in different files, pretty format output.

    • API

  • restSQLstars132 - SQL generator with Java and HTTP APIs, uses a simple RESTful HTTP API with XML or JSON serialization.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Dec 23rd - Dec 29th, 2019
item.description:
Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • Percona Monitoring and Managementstars272 - Open source platform for managing and monitoring MySQL and MongoDB performance.

    • HA/Failover/Sharding

  • Citusstars7.4k - Postgres extension that distributes your data and your queries across multiple nodes.
  • patronistars5k - A template for PostgreSQL High Availability with ZooKeeper, etcd, or Consul.
  • Percona XtraDB Clusterstars297 - A High Scalability Solution for MySQL Clustering and High Availability.
  • stolonstars3.9k - Cloud native PostgreSQL manager for PostgreSQL high availability.
  • pg_auto_failoverstars816 - Postgres extension and service for automated failover and high-availability.
  • pglookoutstars152 - PostgreSQL replication monitoring and failover daemon.
  • PostgreSQL Automatic Failoverstars310 - High-Availibility for Postgres, based on industry references Pacemaker and Corosync.

    • Kubernetes

  • KubeDB - Making running production-grade databases easy on Kubernetes.
  • Postgres operatorstars2.8k - The Postgres Operator enables highly-available PostgreSQL clusters on Kubernetes (K8s) powered by Patroni.
  • Spilostars1k - HA PostgreSQL Clusters with Docker.
  • StackGres - Enterprise-grade, Full Stack PostgreSQL on Kubernetes.

    • Configuration Tuning

  • pgtunestars992 - PostgreSQL configuration wizard.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Nov 4th - Nov 10th, 2019
item.description:
Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

Zabbix

  • pg_monzstars162 - This is the Zabbix monitoring template for PostgreSQL Database.
  • Mamonsustars172 - Monitoring agent for PostgreSQL.
  • ZabbixDBAstars80 - ZabbixDBA is fast, flexible, and continuously developing plugin to monitor your RDBMS.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jul 8th - Jul 14th, 2019
item.description:
IDE

  • IBExpert - Comprehensive GUI tool for Firebird and InterBase.
  • pgAdmin3 - Long Term Support for pgAdmin3.
  • dbKodastars871 - Modern (JavaScript/Electron framework), open source IDE for MongoDB. It has features to support development, administration and performance tuning on MongoDB databases.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • Telegraf PostgreSQL plugin - Provides metrics for your postgres database.

    • HA/Failover/Sharding

  • Vitessstars14.9k - Database clustering system for horizontal scaling of MySQL through generalized sharding.

    • GUI

  • PopSQL - Modern, collaborative SQL editor for your team.

    • Reporting

  • Polistars1.9k - An easy-to-use SQL reporting application built for SQL lovers.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Mar 25th - Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
Schema

Changes

  • migrastars2.6k - Like diff but for PostgreSQL schemas.

    • CLI

    dbcli

  • athenaclistars191 - AthenaCLI is a CLI tool for AWS Athena service that can do auto-completion and syntax highlighting.
  • liteclistars1.7k - CLI for SQLite Databases with auto-completion and syntax highlighting.
  • mssql-clistars1.2k - A command-line client for SQL Server with auto-completion and syntax highlighting.
  • myclistars10.6k - A Terminal Client for MySQL with AutoCompletion and Syntax Highlighting.
  • pgclistars10.7k - Postgres CLI with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.
  • vclistars76 - Vertica CLI with auto-completion and syntax highlighting.

    • GUI

  • sqlpadstars4.6k - Web-based SQL editor run in your own private cloud.
  • JackDB - Direct SQL access to all your data, no matter where it lives.
  • DbVisualizer - Universal database tool for developers, DBAs and analysts.
  • SQLyog - The most complete and easy to use MySQL GUI.
  • SQuirreL - Graphical SQL client written in Java that will allow you to view the structure of a JDBC compliant database, browse the data in tables, issue SQL commands etc.
  • Sequel Prostars8.7k - Sequel Pro is a fast, easy-to-use Mac database management application for working with MySQL & MariaDB databases.
  • phpLiteAdmin - Web-based SQLite database admin tool written in PHP with support for SQLite3 and SQLite2.
  • SQLPro - A simple, powerful Postgres manager for macOS.
  • psequel - PSequel provides a clean and simple interface for you to perform common PostgreSQL tasks quickly.
  • TeamPostgreSQL - PostgreSQL Web Administration GUI - use your PostgreSQL databases from anywhere, with rich, lightning-fast AJAX web interface.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • Monyog - Agentless & Cost-effective MySQL Monitoring Tool.
  • pgMustard - A user interface for Postgres explain plans, plus tips to improve performance.

    • IDE

  • Valentina Studio - Create, administer, query and explore Valentina DB, MySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL and SQLite databases for FREE.
  • MySQL Workbench - MySQL Workbench is a unified visual tool for database architects, developers, and DBAs.
  • PostgreSQL Maestro - Complete and powerful database management, admin and development tool for PostgreSQL.
  • AnySQL Maestro - Premier multi-purpose admin tool for database management, control and development.
  • TOrastars272 - TOra is an open source SQL IDE for Oracle, MySQL and PostgreSQL dbs.

    • API

  • Hasura GraphQL Enginestars28.2k - Blazing fast, instant realtime GraphQL APIs on Postgres with fine grained access control, also trigger webhooks on database events.

    • CLI

  • pg_topstars100 - 'top' for PostgreSQL.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Schema

Changes

  • gh-oststars10.5k - Online schema migration for MySQL.

    • GUI

  • Pgwebstars7.5k - Web-based database browser for PostgreSQL, written in Go and works on macOS, Linux and Windows machines.

    • Schema

    Code generation

  • ddl-generatorstars249 - Infers SQL DDL (Data Definition Language) from table data.

    • CLI

  • ipython-sqlstars1.6k - Connect to a database for issue SQL commands within IPython or IPython Notebook.
  • pg_activitystars16 - Top like application for PostgreSQL server activity monitoring.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Sep 3rd - Sep 9th, 2018
item.description:
IDE

  • dbForge Studio for MySQL - Universal IDE for MySQL and MariaDB database development, management, and administration.
  • dbForge Studio for Oracle - Powerful IDE for Oracle management, administration, and development.
  • dbForge Studio for PostgreSQL - GUI tool for managing and developing databases and objects.
  • dbForge Studio for SQL Server - Powerful integrated development environment for SQL Server development, management, administration, data analysis, and reporting.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jul 30th - Aug 5th, 2018
item.description:
GUI

  • OmniDBstars2.9k - Web tool for database management.

    • API

  • DreamFactorystars1.3k - A open source REST API backend for mobile, web, and IoT applications.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • pgDash - Measure and track every aspect of your PostgreSQL databases.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jul 2nd - Jul 8th, 2018
item.description:
Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • pgwatch2stars1.3k - Flexible self-contained PostgreSQL metrics monitoring/dashboarding solution.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 18th - Jun 24th, 2018
item.description:
Schema

Changes

  • node-pg-migratestars1.1k - Node.js database migration management built exclusively for postgres. (But can also be used for other DBs conforming to SQL standard - e.g. CockroachDB.)

    • GUI

  • Robo 3Tstars9k - Robo 3T (formerly Robomongo) is a shell-centric cross-platform MongoDB management tool.
  • Tabixstars1.8k - SQL Editor & Open source simple business intelligence for Clickhouse.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • PgHerostars6.6k - A performance dashboard for Postgres - health checks, suggested indexes, and more.
  • pganalyze collectorstars238 - Pganalyze statistics collector for gathering PostgreSQL metrics and log data.
  • pgstatsstars103 - Collects PostgreSQL statistics, and either saves them in CSV files or print them on the stdout.

    • IDE

  • Toad - Toad is the premier database solution for developers, admins and data analysts. Manage complex database changes with a single database management tool.
  • Oracle SQL Developer - Oracle SQL Developer is a free, integrated development environment that simplifies the development and management of Oracle Database in both traditional and Cloud deployments.

    • DevOps

  • Toad DevOps Toolkit - Toad DevOps Toolkit executes key database development functions within your DevOps workflow —without compromising quality, performance or reliability.

    • CLI

  • SQLcl - Oracle SQL Developer Command Line (SQLcl) is a free command line interface for Oracle Database.

    • Testing

  • DbFitstars214 - A database testing framework that supports easy test-driven development of your database code.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 11th - Jun 17th, 2018
item.description:
IDE

  • Aqua Data Studio - Aqua Data Studio is productivity software for Database Developers, DBAs, and Analysts.
  • HeidiSQLstars3.5k - A lightweight client for managing MySQL, MSSQL and PostgreSQL, written in Delphi.
  • Navicat - A database development tool that allows you to simultaneously connect to MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, and SQLite databases from a single application.
  • pgAdmin - The most popular and feature rich Open Source administration and development platform for PostgreSQL, the most advanced Open Source database in the world.

    • GUI

  • Adminerstars5.4k - Database management in a single PHP file.
  • phpMyAdminstars6.2k - A web interface for MySQL and MariaDB.
  • Postico - A Modern PostgreSQL Client for the Mac.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • Navicat Monitor - A safe, simple and agentless remote server monitoring tool that is packed with powerful features to make your monitoring effective as possible.

    • DevOps

  • DBmaestro - DBmaestro accelerates release cycles & supports agility across the entire IT ecosystem.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 4th - Jun 10th, 2018
item.description:
API

  • preststars3.4k - Is a way to serve a RESTful API from any databases written in Go.
  • resquelstars105 - Easily convert your SQL database into a REST API.
  • Oracle REST Data Services - A mid-tier Java application, ORDS maps HTTP(S) verbs (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.) to database transactions and returns any results formatted using JSON.

    • IDE

  • DataGrip - Cross-Platform IDE for Databases & SQL by JetBrains.
  • DBeaverstars28.7k - Free universal database manager and SQL client.

    • CLI

  • pspgstars1.9k - Postgres Pager.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • pgmetricsstars791 - Collect and display information and stats from a running PostgreSQL server.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

    Zabbix

  • Orabbix - Orabbix is a plugin designed to work with Zabbix Enterprise Monitor to provide multi-tiered monitoring, performance and availability reporting and measurement for Oracle Databases, along with server performance metrics.
  • Pyorastars104 - Python script to monitor Oracle Databases.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 28th - Jun 3rd, 2018
item.description:
CLI

  • pgcenterstars1.4k - Top-like admin tool for PostgreSQL.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 14th - May 20th, 2018
item.description:
IDE

  • Database .net - Multiple database management tool with support for 20+ databases.

    • GUI

  • TablePlusstars2.8k - Modern, native, and friendly GUI tool for relational databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite & more.

    • Schema

    Changes

  • 2bassstars36 - Database configuration-as-code tool that utilizes concept of idempotent DDL scripts.
  • flywaystars6.8k - Database migration tool.
  • liquibasestars3.5k - Database-independent library for tracking, managing and applying database schema changes.
  • Pyrseasstars339 - Provides utilities to describe a PostgreSQL database schema as YAML.

    • API

  • Prisma - Prisma turns your database into a realtime GraphQL API.
  • PostgRESTstars19.3k - REST API for any Postgres database.
